metadata.vcsCommitMessage:
feat: implement secure HR document storage infrastructure

Implement production-grade AWS infrastructure for secure HR document storage:

- S3 bucket (eu-west-1) with AES-256 encryption and versioning
- Cross-region replication to eu-central-1 for disaster recovery
- Three-tier IAM role structure (Admin/Manager/Staff) with MFA protection
- KMS customer-managed encryption keys with annual rotation
- CloudTrail API logging (2-year retention) for audit trail
- S3 access logging for comprehensive access tracking
- CloudWatch dashboards and 6 alarms for operational visibility
- SNS topic for infrastructure alerts

Compliance:
- GDPR Article 32: Encryption, access control, audit logging, key rotation
- SOC 2 Type II: Comprehensive audit trail, monitoring, access controls
- Data residency: EU-only (Ireland + Frankfurt)

Generated files:
- 13 Terraform infrastructure files (.tf)
- 2 environment configuration files (.tfvars)
- 4 comprehensive documentation files (README, DEPLOYMENT, CHECKLIST)

All 94 implementation tasks completed. Infrastructure ready for deployment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
